# PHIL.177 ? Tail Risk Awareness

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** tail_risk_awareness
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Pay attention to low-probability, high-impact events

## Application
Identify tail risks, protect against ruin, don't ignore unlikely disasters

philosophy, risk-management, tail-risk-awareness
